binary_checks: Did the answer identify governance/capability/oversight as the main bottleneck rather than only budget pressure?
Did the answer name at least one real slow variable such as consequence culture, procurement systems, or reporting capability?
Did the top intervention act on high-impact governance/control failures directly?
Did the answer avoid distractors like generic more-funding or communications-first fixes?
Did the answer include at least one concrete early-warning signal?

slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.1: One real slow variable or mixed with symptoms
slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.2: Multiple real slow variables, clearly separated from symptoms

distractor_resistance_0_to_2.2: Stays focused on the real constraint
